sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44400" key="eu)/logxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔλογχ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λέλογχα</etym>) <sense id="n44400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fortunate, propitious</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">166</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
